query:
SELECT section, entity, status, triggered_by, started_at, finished_at, current_stage, progress, error_message
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
ORDER BY started_at DESC
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute 
SELECT section, entity, status, triggered_by, started_at, finished_at, current_stage, progress, error_message
